key_items: Bitcoin miners becoming critical AI infrastructure suppliers with 27 GW planned power and $90B in AI deals - major structural bullish catalyst
Bitcoin dip buyers positioned at $70K support with strong institutional demand signals from ETF inflows and major treasury accumulation by MSTR and Strive
Regulatory clarity improving with SEC tokenized stock exemption coming, UK BoE supporting tokenization, and Japan Bitcoin ETF plans opening household savings channels
reasoning: Macro backdrop is shifting positively with miners positioning as AI power brokers, institutional accumulation accelerating (MSTR, Strive, Bitwise), and regulatory frameworks solidifying across major economies. Near-term technical weakness below $77K appears to be capitulation setting up dip-buying opportunities rather than trend reversal, supported by orderbook data showing buyers queued at $70K.
risks: Heavy ETF outflows exceeding $1B combined with resistance breakdown below $77K could trigger cascade liquidations if Bitcoin breaks $76K support level, though dip-buyer positioning may absorb significant selling pressure.
